title: Build a Feature Engineering Pipeline
input_format: Raw data records and a list of transformation operations to apply
output_format: Transformed feature matrix after applying the pipeline
constraints: 1 <= rows <= 10000, 1 <= columns <= 50, supported operations: normalize, standardize, one_hot, bin, log_transform
function_signature: function featureEngineeringPipeline(data: any[][], columns: string[], operations: string[]): { features: number[][]; column_names: string[] }
